vulnerabilities.title: Marimo Marimo
vulnerabilities.name: Marimo Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: Marimo contains an pre-authorization remote code execution vulnerability, allowing an unauthenticated attacked to shell access and execute arbitrary system commands.
vulnerabilities.short_description: Marimo contains an pre-authorization remote code execution vulnerability, allowing an unauthenticated attacked to...
vulnerabilities.fix: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
